mapper.select: SELECT BLOCK_ID AS "blockId", TARGET AS "target", BLOCK_TYPE AS "blockType", REASON AS "reason", REASON_EN AS "reasonEn", STATUS AS "status", CASE WHEN EXPIRES_AT IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE TO_CHAR(EXPIRES_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') END AS "expiresAt", OWNER AS "owner", OWNER_EN AS "ownerEn", SOURCE AS "source", SOURCE_TITLE AS "sourceTitle", SOURCE_FINGERPRINT AS "sourceFingerprint", SOURCE_SEVERITY AS "sourceSeverity", CASE WHEN REGISTERED_AT IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE TO_CHAR(REGISTERED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') END AS "registeredAt", CASE WHEN ACTIVATED_AT IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE TO_CHAR(ACTIVATED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') END AS "activatedAt", ACTIVATED_BY AS "activatedBy", CASE WHEN REVIEWED_AT IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE TO_CHAR(REVIEWED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') END AS "reviewedAt", REVIEWED_BY AS "reviewedBy", CASE WHEN LAST_ACTION_AT IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE TO_CHAR(LAST_ACTION_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') END AS "updatedAt", LAST_ACTION_BY AS "updatedBy" FROM COMTNBLOCKLISTENTRY WHERE COALESCE(USE_AT, 'Y') = 'Y' ORDER BY LAST_ACTION_AT DESC, BLOCK_ID DESC

SELECT ACTION_ID AS "actionId", BLOCK_ID AS "blockId", TARGET AS "target", ACTION_TYPE AS "actionType", STATUS AS "status", DETAIL AS "detail", DETAIL_EN AS "detailEn", ACTOR_ID AS "actorId", ACTOR_NAME AS "actorName", SOURCE AS "source", CASE WHEN ACTION_AT IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE TO_CHAR(ACTION_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') END AS "actionAt", CASE WHEN EXPIRES_AT IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE TO_CHAR(EXPIRES_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') END AS "expiresAt" FROM COMTNBLOCKLISTACTIONHIST WHERE COALESCE(USE_AT, 'Y') = 'Y' ORDER BY ACTION_AT DESC, ACTION_ID DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO COMTNBLOCKLISTENTRY ( BLOCK_ID, TARGET, BLOCK_TYPE, REASON, REASON_EN, STATUS, EXPIRES_AT, OWNER, OWNER_EN, SOURCE, SOURCE_TITLE, SOURCE_FINGERPRINT, SOURCE_SEVERITY, REGISTERED_AT, ACTIVATED_AT, ACTIVATED_BY, REVIEWED_AT, REVIEWED_BY, LAST_ACTION_AT, LAST_ACTION_BY, USE_AT, FRST_REGISTER_ID, FRST_REGIST_PNTTM, LAST_UPDUSR_ID, LAST_UPDT_PNTTM ) VALUES ( #{blockId}, #{target}, #{blockType}, #{reason}, #{reasonEn}, #{status}, CASE WHEN #{expiresAt} IS NULL OR #{expiresAt} = '' THEN NULL ELSE TO_DATETIME(#{expiresAt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') END, #{owner}, #{ownerEn}, #{source}, #{sourceTitle}, #{sourceFingerprint}, #{sourceSeverity}, CASE WHEN #{registeredAt} IS NULL OR #{registeredAt} = '' THEN CURRENT_DATETIME ELSE TO_DATETIME(#{registeredAt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') END, CASE WHEN #{activatedAt} IS NULL OR #{activatedAt} = '' THEN NULL ELSE TO_DATETIME(#{activatedAt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') END, #{activatedBy}, CASE WHEN #{reviewedAt} IS NULL OR #{reviewedAt} = '' THEN NULL ELSE TO_DATETIME(#{reviewedAt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') END, #{reviewedBy}, CASE WHEN #{updatedAt} IS NULL OR #{updatedAt} = '' THEN CURRENT_DATETIME ELSE TO_DATETIME(#{updatedAt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') END, #{updatedBy}, 'Y', COALESCE(#{owner}, 'system'), CURRENT_DATETIME, COALESCE(#{updatedBy}, #{owner}, 'system'), CURRENT_DATETIME )
mapper.update: UPDATE COMTNBLOCKLISTENTRY SET TARGET = #{target}, BLOCK_TYPE = #{blockType}, REASON = #{reason}, REASON_EN = #{reasonEn}, STATUS = #{status}, EXPIRES_AT = CASE WHEN #{expiresAt} IS NULL OR #{expiresAt} = '' THEN NULL ELSE TO_DATETIME(#{expiresAt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') END, OWNER = #{owner}, OWNER_EN = #{ownerEn}, SOURCE = #{source}, SOURCE_TITLE = #{sourceTitle}, SOURCE_FINGERPRINT = #{sourceFingerprint}, SOURCE_SEVERITY = #{sourceSeverity}, REGISTERED_AT = CASE WHEN #{registeredAt} IS NULL OR #{registeredAt} = '' THEN REGISTERED_AT ELSE TO_DATETIME(#{registeredAt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') END, ACTIVATED_AT = CASE WHEN #{activatedAt} IS NULL OR #{activatedAt} = '' THEN NULL ELSE TO_DATETIME(#{activatedAt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') END, ACTIVATED_BY = #{activatedBy}, REVIEWED_AT = CASE WHEN #{reviewedAt} IS NULL OR #{reviewedAt} = '' THEN NULL ELSE TO_DATETIME(#{reviewedAt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') END, REVIEWED_BY = #{reviewedBy}, LAST_ACTION_AT = CASE WHEN #{updatedAt} IS NULL OR #{updatedAt} = '' THEN CURRENT_DATETIME ELSE TO_DATETIME(#{updatedAt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') END, LAST_ACTION_BY = #{updatedBy}, LAST_UPDUSR_ID = COALESCE(#{updatedBy}, LAST_UPDUSR_ID), LAST_UPDT_PNTTM = CURRENT_DATETIME WHERE BLOCK_ID = #{blockId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO COMTNBLOCKLISTACTIONHIST ( ACTION_ID, BLOCK_ID, TARGET, ACTION_TYPE, STATUS, DETAIL, DETAIL_EN, ACTOR_ID, ACTOR_NAME, SOURCE, ACTION_AT, EXPIRES_AT, USE_AT, FRST_REGISTER_ID, FRST_REGIST_PNTTM, LAST_UPDUSR_ID, LAST_UPDT_PNTTM ) VALUES ( #{actionId}, #{blockId}, #{target}, #{actionType}, #{status}, #{detail}, #{detailEn}, #{actorId}, #{actorName}, #{source}, CASE WHEN #{actionAt} IS NULL OR #{actionAt} = '' THEN CURRENT_DATETIME ELSE TO_DATETIME(#{actionAt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') END, CASE WHEN #{expiresAt} IS NULL OR #{expiresAt} = '' THEN NULL ELSE TO_DATETIME(#{expiresAt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') END, 'Y', COALESCE(#{actorId}, 'system'), CURRENT_DATETIME, COALESCE(#{actorId}, 'system'), CURRENT_DATETIME )
mapper.update: UPDATE COMTNBLOCKLISTACTIONHIST SET BLOCK_ID = #{blockId}, TARGET = #{target}, ACTION_TYPE = #{actionType}, STATUS = #{status}, DETAIL = #{detail}, DETAIL_EN = #{detailEn}, ACTOR_ID = #{actorId}, ACTOR_NAME = #{actorName}, SOURCE = #{source}, ACTION_AT = CASE WHEN #{actionAt} IS NULL OR #{actionAt} = '' THEN ACTION_AT ELSE TO_DATETIME(#{actionAt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') END, EXPIRES_AT = CASE WHEN #{expiresAt} IS NULL OR #{expiresAt} = '' THEN NULL ELSE TO_DATETIME(#{expiresAt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') END, LAST_UPDUSR_ID = COALESCE(#{actorId}, LAST_UPDUSR_ID), LAST_UPDT_PNTTM = CURRENT_DATETIME WHERE ACTION_ID = #{actionId}
